notes: Iter 5: TEST USER THEORY — heavy TQQQ in R1 base (raw bounds give ≥54% normalized TQQQ in R1), TQQQ FREE in R2/R3 upside overrides (so signals can override TQQQ-out and 'go for it'), TQQQ=0 in all base/protection of R2/R3 and R1.protection. Compared to iter 4, this RELAXES the previously-forced-zero R2_upside_w_tqqq_raw (now free) but ADDS forced zero on R3_base_w_tqqq_raw (was free). Hypothesis: leverage in R1 (calm) is OK, leverage during stressed regimes' base/protection causes deepest drawdowns; signal overrides should be the only mechanism allowing leverage in stressed regimes.
